name: openclaw-token-usage-ledger
description: OpenClaw plugin that records model token usage events to SQLite and reports usage by user, model, channel, source, and time.

dbPath.description: Absolute path to the SQLite database file. Defaults to a file inside the plugin's data directory.

logLevel.description: Controls how much detail is written to debug.jsonl. Accepted values: off, error, info, debug. Defaults to debug.

debug.description: Optional development diagnostics for raw hook payload capture.

captureHookPayloads.description: When true, write every received hook event and context payload to hook-payloads.jsonl. Defaults to false.

includeContent.description: When true, include prompt/response/tool content fields if OpenClaw exposes them in hook payloads. Defaults to true when capture is enabled.

redactSecrets.description: When true, redact obvious secret fields such as tokens, authorization headers, cookies, passwords, API keys, and secrets. Defaults to true.

maxPayloadBytes.description: Maximum bytes per JSONL debug record before replacing payloads with a truncated marker. Defaults to 262144.

logPath.description: Absolute path for raw hook payload JSONL. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/plugins/token-usage-ledger/hook-payloads.jsonl.

enabled.description: When true, mirror each locally recorded usage row to a central HTTP ingest endpoint.

url.description: HTTP endpoint that accepts usage event POST requests.

apiKey.description: Bearer token used for the central ingest endpoint.

timeoutMs.description: Mirror request timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 5000.

retryIntervalMs.description: Background retry flush interval for unsynced mirror events in milliseconds. Defaults to 15000.

retryBaseDelayMs.description: Base delay for exponential retry backoff in milliseconds. Defaults to 2000.

retryMaxDelayMs.description: Maximum delay for exponential retry backoff in milliseconds. Defaults to 300000.

maxBatchSize.description: Maximum number of queued mirror events sent in a single flush. Defaults to 50.

interface.shortDescription: Durable local token accounting for OpenClaw model calls.
interface.longDescription: Records one SQLite usage event per model call from OpenClaw hooks, keeps prompts and responses out of the ledger by default, and provides deterministic reports for daily usage review.
defaultPrompt: Group usage by model and user.
Create a daily token report cron.
